title: API Endpoint
scenario: Write a prompt to generate API documentation for a POST request to the '/orders' endpoint. Ensure the output includes a description of the request body and any relevant headers.
constraints: Must include a description of the request body

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the word count and formatting constraints.
Verify if the output includes a description of the request body.
Evaluate if the output includes a description of any relevant headers.
